mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task ( task_no, task_name, vehicle_id, vehicle_plate, driver_id, driver_name, start_warehouse_id, start_warehouse_name, end_warehouse_id, end_warehouse_name, status, start_time, end_time, remark, priority, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{taskNo}, #{taskName}, #{vehicleId}, #{vehiclePlate}, #{driverId}, #{driverName}, #{startWarehouseId}, #{startWarehouseName}, #{endWarehouseId}, #{endWarehouseName}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET actual_start_time = NOW(), status = 'IN_PROGRESS', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET actual_end_time = NOW(), status = 'COMPLETED', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE task SET vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}, vehicle_plate = #{vehiclePlate}, driver_id = #{driverId}, driver_name = #{driverName}, status = 'ASSIGNED', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task
AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM task WHERE status IN ('ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND end_time < NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_cargo ( task_id, cargo_id, cargo_name, weight, volume, quantity, unit, create_time ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{cargoId}, #{cargoName}, #{weight}, #{volume}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO task_cargo ( task_id, cargo_id, cargo_name, weight, volume, quantity, unit, create_time ) VALUES
( #{cargo.taskId}, #{cargo.cargoId}, #{cargo.cargoName}, #{cargo.weight}, #{cargo.volume}, #{cargo.quantity}, #{cargo.unit}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task
AND status = #{status}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as inProgress, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'TIMEOUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as timeout, COUNT(*) as total FROM task
